prompt:
Create a high-end cinematic character development board for a grounded sci-fi film universe.

The presentation should resemble a professional Hollywood pre-production document rather than a clean template. Use layered panels, overlapping renders, handwritten-style annotations, and cinematic framing.
Design a realistic female space pilot with believable anatomy, subtle asymmetry, realistic facial structure, and worn futuristic clothing. Include helmet concepts, suit material closeups, emotional portraits, full-body rotation views, and gear breakdowns.
Style: soft cool lighting, NASA-inspired realism, cinematic lens blur, brushed metal textures, subtle futuristic interfaces, atmospheric sci-fi realism, premium concept-art presentation.
